title: Manager Reviews Employee Record (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: Manager / Supervisor can perform "Manager Reviews Employee Record" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Manager Reviews Employee Record

positiveTests: Manager Reviews Employee Record succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Manager Reviews Employee Record is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Manager Reviews Employee Record.
permissionTests: Manager Reviews Employee Record is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Manager Reviews Employee Record -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: High - core lifecycle step, breaking this blocks the whole module
performanceTests: Manager Reviews Employee Record completes within accepted UX/API thresholds.
securityTests: Verify role-based access for Manager / Supervisor.
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-04 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.impact: High release impact; blocks release if incomplete.
release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Manager Reviews Employee Record changes while preserving audit data.
